summary: Completed comprehensive UI/design testing for BringsAI website improvements. Tested star animations, DSGVO badge styling, footer lighting fixes, and Über-uns page redesign.
passed_tests: Homepage loads correctly with 150 visible stars in background
Stars are moving smoothly with CSS animation drift (8 different animations)
DSGVO-Badge has visible blue border (2px border with blue accent color)
Footer area has no visible lighting stripes (0px border-top, clean background)
Über-uns page loads with new clean Stripe/Linear/Vercel-style design
Über-uns page has 4 value cards with proper icons and content
Über-uns page has team section with 2 cards for Junis and Simon
Über-uns page has CTA section at the bottom with working button
